why: P0-81 metadata-only selector failed the locked retain gate by retaining only 0.893949 of P0-76 gain. Crop-context selector is the next meaningful option, but the current candidate set is small and narrow (sink/tiny P0-76 additions), so the expected gain does not justify starting a new image model unless downstream urgently needs it.

crop_context_option.minimum_reasonable_scope: Build crop dataset for P0-76/P0-78 added candidates plus matched v28 baseline candidates, not just the 192 smoke added candidates.
required_before_start: Downstream task requires higher symbol quality than P0-76/P0-78
Budget to extract raster crops and train/evaluate at least a tiny CNN
Smoke-only split definition that avoids locked tuning

next_recommendation: Use P0-76 or P0-78 in downstream integration. Reopen crop-context selector only when downstream evidence shows symbol policy quality is the bottleneck.
